title: Yo Zappa Do!
description: Expect the unexpected with America’s favorite teen wizard, Yo Zappa Do.
quote: Yo, yo, yo, what do you say? Here I am to save the day.
altHero: Yo Zappa Do, a blonde teen boy wizard
alt2: Yo Zappa Do talking with two girls and a man in a dog suit
alt4: monkey wearing a Yo Zappa Do! shirt
